---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an addition or change to the SDK
title: '[feature] '
labels: enhancement
---

**Problem**
What can't you do today? Be concrete about the use case.

**Proposed solution**
What should the SDK look like? Pseudo-code is great.

```python
client.foo.bar(…)
```

**Alternatives considered**
Have you worked around this another way? Why isn't that good enough?
